short_answer: Best default buy: Sonos Era 100. Best higher-end non-Cast alternative: Bluesound PULSE M. Best compact luxury option if you accept Android risk: B&O Beosound Emerge. Denon Home 150 remains a fallback only because Spotify's exact page says Lossless 16-bit, not 24-bit.
methodology_summary: Started from Spotify's own Connect site, extracted the embedded catalog from https://connect.spotify.com/, then verified exact models individually at https://connect.spotify.com/devices/<slug>.
Used manufacturer pages and official PDFs to confirm form factor, Bluetooth, Google Cast status, price, and UK availability.
Ran a second-pass Android risk review using recent Spotify Community threads and relevant brand-community posts.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Sonos UK official page showed £199 and in stock on 2026-04-14.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Google Assistant control exists in the Sonos ecosystem, but Sonos community evidence says Sonos does not support Chromecast. That is good for this brief.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes. Single powered tabletop speaker, 182.5 x 120 x 130.5 mm, close to the Nest Audio brief.
candidates.why_it_is_here: This is the cleanest combination of exact Spotify 24-bit proof, low Android risk, compact size, UK availability, and sensible price.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Bluesound UK pages showed £429 on 2026-04-14 and active store inventory markup, though the site embeds mixed stock snippets and should be double-checked at checkout.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: No Google Cast or Chromecast support was found in official product material reviewed, and Bluesound community posts complain that Chromecast is still missing.
candidates.bluetooth_summary: Yes. Bluetooth 5.0 with aptX HD support is listed on the official product page.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes, but larger than Nest Audio. Single powered tabletop speaker, 171 x 204 x 149 mm.
candidates.why_it_is_here: This is the strongest more-hi-fi, non-Cast alternative under budget, and it avoids the main Android failure mode that affects Cast-capable speakers.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: B&O UK official page showed £900 and InStock on 2026-04-14.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Official B&O material explicitly lists Google Cast and describes grouped playback via Google Cast or AirPlay.
candidates.bluetooth_summary: Yes. Bluetooth 5.0 is listed on the official page.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes. Single powered compact speaker with a slim bookshelf-like footprint, 6.7 W x 25.5 H x 16.5 D cm.
candidates.why_it_is_here: It satisfies the exact Spotify 24-bit requirement and has the most elegant compact form factor, but the Android Cast-vs-Connect evidence is directly unfavorable for B&O speakers.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Spotify's exact model page confirms Lossless 16-bit, not Lossless 24-bit.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Richer Sounds showed the standard Home 150 Black at £219 and the Home 150 NV variant at £179 on 2026-04-14. Availability appears retailer-led rather than strongly direct-from-brand.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: No Google Cast support was found in the official Denon material reviewed; Denon instead emphasizes HEOS, AirPlay 2, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and Alexa.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes. Single powered compact speaker, roughly 120 x 187 x 120 mm.
candidates.why_it_is_here: If exact 24-bit proof turns out to be negotiable, this is still a compact standalone speaker with native Spotify Connect and likely lower Cast-related risk than Chromecast-capable rivals.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Not confirmed. The attempted exact Spotify page was missing or unparseable.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Current UK retailer pricing appears around £309, so price is not the problem.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Official JBL material explicitly lists Chromecast built-in, Spotify Connect, Bluetooth, and Google Home multi-room playback.
candidates.bluetooth_summary: Yes. Official JBL spec sheet lists Bluetooth 5.3.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes, but wider than Nest Audio. Single powered tabletop speaker, 266.3 x 171.7 x 167.4 mm.
candidates.why_it_is_here: This is an attractive paper candidate, but it fails the exact Spotify-page requirement and sits in the high-risk Google Cast class.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Spotify exact proof is too weak. Spotify has an exact page for Audio Pro A10, but it does not confirm 24-bit and may not cover the current MkII retail model.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: UK listings exist, but exact current pricing was not pinned down in this pass because Spotify proof failed first.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Official Audio Pro material confirms Google Cast, AirPlay 2, Bluetooth, and Spotify Connect.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Yes. Compact standalone speaker in the right general class.
candidates.why_it_is_here: This is the most obvious near-miss. The hardware is plausible, but it does not meet the exact Spotify-page evidence rule for this project.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Sonos UK official page showed £449 on 2026-04-14.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Same Sonos ecosystem position as Era 100: useful Google Assistant control options, but not a Chromecast target.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Not really. Single powered speaker, but substantially larger than Nest Audio at roughly 241 x 160 x 127 mm.
candidates.why_it_is_here: A good speaker, but it misses the size target that matters in this brief.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: B&O UK official page showed £1,400 and InStock on 2026-04-14.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Official B&O ecosystem support includes Google Cast.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Standalone speaker, but over budget and less Nest-like than the top picks.
candidates.why_it_is_here: Spotify confirmation is excellent, but the speaker is over the stated budget cap.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Current pricing was not pinned down in this pass because the form-factor mismatch already excluded it.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Same low-risk Sonos ecosystem position as Era 100.
candidates.form_factor_summary: Too small. It is portable-speaker sized rather than a meaningful Nest Audio upgrade.
candidates.why_it_is_here: Technically eligible on Spotify, but it is the wrong scale for this purchase.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Pricing was not pinned because the product fails the single-speaker requirement first.
candidates.google_home_google_cast_summary: Google Assistant is referenced on Spotify's page, but the main exclusion is form factor.
candidates.form_factor_summary: No. This is a pair of active speakers, not a single self-contained speaker.
candidates.why_it_is_here: Excluded by the hard requirement for one self-contained speaker.

candidates.spotify_exact_verdict: Confirmed Lossless 24-bit on Spotify's exact model page.
candidates.uk_availability_summary: Not pinned because the product fails the product-type requirement first.
candidates.form_factor_summary: No. It is a streamer, not a speaker.
candidates.why_it_is_here: Useful sanity check that Spotify's catalog contains 24-bit devices that are not speakers and must be excluded manually.
